meta.attribution: Product data attributed to Product Hunt.
meta.commercialUsage: Product Hunt API must not be used for commercial purposes without Product Hunt approval.

issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: ExploreYC
products.tagline: Open-source API for Y Combinator & a16z company data
products.summaryZh: Y Combinator 与 a16z 公司数据的开源 API
products.descriptionZh: 一个开源API，覆盖Y Combinator和a16z的初创公司数据——6600多家公司的融资、阶段、IPO/并购退出及创始人信息。可按风投机构（yc/a16z/全部）、批次、行业、国家筛选，或直接搜索。获取免费API密钥，阅读文档（curl/Node/Python + Swagger），30秒内即可开始构建。此外还有完整网页应用：地图、分析、融资数据、实时招聘看板及AI工具。
products.description: One open-source API for startup data across Y Combinator AND a16z - 6,600+ companies with funding, stage, IPO/M&A exits, and founders. Filter by VC (yc/a16z/all), batch, industry, country, or search. Grab a free API key, read the docs (curl/Node/Python + Swagger), and build in 30 seconds. Plus the full web app: map, analytics, funding data, a live hiring board, and AI tools.

products.name: IvyForms
products.tagline: A WordPress form builder for real workflows
products.summaryZh: WordPress表单构建器，专为真实工作流设计
products.descriptionZh: IvyForms 是一款WordPress表单构建工具，可将提交内容转化为结构化工作流程。通过简洁的拖拽式构建器，创建联系表单、申请表、注册表、调查问卷、反馈表单及多步骤流程。随后管理条目、分析回复、应用条件逻辑，并将数据连接至wpDataTables、Amelia、Mailchimp及Webhooks等工具，使每条回复都能推动工作进展。
products.description: IvyForms is a WordPress form builder for turning submissions into structured workflows. Create contact forms, applications, registrations, surveys, feedback forms, and multi-step flows with a clean drag-and-drop builder. Then manage entries, analyze responses, apply conditional logic, and connect data to tools like wpDataTables, Amelia, Mailchimp, and webhooks so every response can move work forward.

products.name: Willow Frontier Pro
products.tagline: The fastest, most accurate dictation model in the world
products.summaryZh: 全球最快、最准确的听写模型
products.descriptionZh: Willow 推出两款全新语音 AI 模型：Willow Frontier Pro 和 Willow Frontier Mini。Frontier Pro 是我们最强大的听写模型，专为需要在任何工作场景下快速、准确、流畅写作的用户打造。Frontier Mini 轻量且完全免费使用。在免费套餐中，用户可无限次使用该模型。它比其他 AI 听写工具更快、更准确。
products.description: Willow is launching two new voice AI models: Willow Frontier Pro and Willow Frontier Mini. Frontier Pro is our most powerful dictation model. It is built for people who want fast, accurate, and polished writing anywhere they work. Frontier mini is lightweight and completely free to use. On our free plan, users get unlimited access to this model. It's faster and more accurate than other AI dictation tools.

products.name: Link Preview API
products.tagline: Free API to get Open Graph data, title & images for any URL
products.summaryZh: 免费API，用于获取任意URL的Open Graph数据、标题和图片
products.descriptionZh: 完全免费。获取在应用中渲染丰富链接卡片所需的一切——就像在 Slack、iMessage 或 Twitter 中粘贴链接时看到的那种。针对 YouTube、Amazon、Twitter、Airbnb、SoundCloud、NYT、Vimeo、Giphy 等热门网站提供专属处理，每次都能返回可靠、高质量的预览。内置图片验证和 JavaScript 渲染功能。可直接在浏览器中使用，无需代理服务器。免费使用额度高达 20,000 次链接预览。
products.description: Completely free. Get back everything you need to render a rich link card in your app – the kind you see in Slack, iMessage, or Twitter when someone pastes a link. Dedicated handling for popular websites like YouTube, Amazon, Twitter, Airbnb, SoundCloud, NYT, Vimeo, Giphy, and more. These return reliable, high-quality previews every time. Built in image validation, and JavaScript rendering. Works directly from the browser, no proxy server required. Free usage up to 20,000 link previews.

products.name: LemonLime
products.tagline: Automates your existing workflows with a single prompt.
products.summaryZh: 通过单一提示词自动化现有工作流程。
products.descriptionZh: LemonLime让团队在几分钟内一键自动化工作流程。它能连接你现有的工具，研究你的业务，并自主创建支持团队的专业AI代理和自动化流程。不知从何入手？LemonLime也能帮到你，它会自动推荐可一键实施的自动化方案。
products.description: LemonLime lets teams automate their workflows in minutes with a single click. It connects to your existing tools, studies your business, and self-creates specialized AI agents and automations that support your team. Don’t know where to start?  LemonLime helps with that, too, automatically surfacing suggested automations that you can implement with a single click.

products.name: Orbit for Mac
products.tagline: Every Google account, in a single window
products.summaryZh: 所有Google账户，尽在一个窗口
products.descriptionZh: 每个Google账户在Mac上拥有独立空间，完全隔离。每个账户都是真实的Gmail网页界面，包含日历、云端硬盘、Meet和Gemini。无需服务器，无需订阅：一次付费（首发价$19，之后$89）。使用⌘1-9切换。原生Swift开发，应用仅12 MB。14天免费试用，无需绑定银行卡。
products.description: Every Google account in its own room on your Mac, fully isolated. Each one is the real Gmail web UI, with Calendar, Drive, Meet, and Gemini. No server, no subscription: pay once ($19 launch price, $89 after). Switch with ⌘1-9. Native Swift, a 12 MB app. 14-day free trial, no card needed.

products.name: PopTask for Apple
products.tagline: Turn to-dos into scheduled tasks
products.summaryZh: 将待办事项转化为定时任务
products.descriptionZh: PopTask 现已全面支持多平台。输入一条零散的想法，比如“健身房 周一三五 早6点”，大约3秒内即可生成一个已排期的任务，无需选择器，也无需填写表单。在 iPhone 和 iPad 上，你可以使用主屏幕和锁屏小组件、显示下一个任务倒计时的实时活动与灵动岛、控制中心，甚至在车内也能免提使用 Siri。在 Mac 上，它位于菜单栏中（⌘⌃P）。所有内容通过你的 iCloud 在设备间近乎即时同步。设备端运行，保护隐私，支持 9 种语言。免费开始使用。
products.description: PopTask just went universal. type a messy thought like "gym mon wed fri 6am" and it becomes a scheduled task in about 3 seconds, no pickers, no forms. on iphone + ipad you get home and lock screen widgets, a live activity + dynamic island counting down your next task, control center, and hands-free siri even in the car. on mac it lives in the menu bar (⌘⌃P). everything syncs across your devices through your own icloud, near-instant. on-device, private, 9 languages. free to start

products.name: agents-cli
products.tagline: The CLI your coding agent uses to ship agents
products.summaryZh: 你的编码代理用于发布代理的CLI
products.descriptionZh: 一个命令行工具，用于在 Google Cloud 上搭建、评估和部署 AI 代理——专为你的编码代理（如 Antigravity、Claude Code、Codex）驱动而设计。搭建一个生产就绪的项目，根据真实信号进行评估，并部署到 Agent Runtime、Cloud Run、GKE 或其他任何地方！
products.description: One command-line tool to scaffold, evaluate, and deploy AI agents on Google Cloud — built to be driven by your coding agent (e.g Antigravity, Claude Code, Codex). Scaffold a production-ready project, evaluate against a real signal, and ship to Agent Runtime, Cloud Run, or GKE or anywhere else!

products.name: New small business tools by IFTTT
products.tagline: Run your business with HubSpot, Figma, and more
products.summaryZh: 使用HubSpot、Figma等工具运营你的业务
products.descriptionZh: 全新业务工具套件现已登陆IFTTT。连接HubSpot、Figma、Customer.io、Xero、FreshBooks、SendGrid、Apollo等18款工具，自动化处理那些耗费时间的日常运营环节。无论是新员工入职、发送发票、产品发布还是网站维护，连接后即可自动运行。就连域名到期也不会再措手不及。所有工具均可接入Slack、Google Sheets、短信等平台。
products.description: A whole new stack of business tools just hit IFTTT. Connect HubSpot, Figma, Customer.io, Xero, FreshBooks, SendGrid, Apollo, and 13 more to automate the parts of running a business that eat up your time. Whether you're onboarding a new hire, sending invoices, launching a product, or keeping your website up, it all runs once connected. Even your domain expiration won't catch you off guard. Hook it all up to Slack, Google Sheets, SMS, and more.

products.name: Universal-3.5 Pro
products.tagline: The most accurate STT model from AssemblyAI.
products.summaryZh: AssemblyAI 最精准的语音转文本模型。
products.descriptionZh: Universal-3.5 Pro 是 AssemblyAI 最精准的语音转文本模型，现已通过实时与异步端点提供服务。该模型能逐字转录每一段对话——支持18种语言的语码转换、目前最精确的说话人分离功能，以及通过上下文提示引导输出结果。
products.description: Universal-3.5 Pro is AssemblyAI's most accurate speech-to-text model, now available at our Realtime & Async endpoints. It transcribes every conversation exactly as it's heard—code-switching across 18 languages, our most accurate speaker diarization yet, and contextual prompting to steer results.

products.name: Notion Agents iOS app
products.tagline: Chat with Notion Agents anytime
products.summaryZh: 随时与Notion Agents对话
products.descriptionZh: 一条语音备忘。一张餐巾纸上的草图。深夜11点的一个问题。在你回到工位前，一切已处理妥当。随时随地，从你所有关联工具、Notion文档、数据库和项目中获取答案。用文字、语音或照片捕捉灵感，让智能助手为你整理。快速执行操作，如创建页面、草拟更新或在关联工具中搜索——一切尽在简洁的对话中。
products.description: A voice note. A photo of a napkin sketch. A question at 11pm. All handled before you're back at your desk. Get answers from all your connected tools and Notion docs, databases, and projects on the go. Capture ideas with text, voice, or photos, and let agents organize them for you. Take quick actions like creating pages, drafting updates, or searching across your connected tools—all from a simple chat.

products.name: Eodly
products.tagline: Know what your team actually shipped today
products.summaryZh: 了解你的团队今天实际交付了什么
products.descriptionZh: Eodly 读取 Slack、Telegram、Discord、GitHub 和 Linear，每晚向创始人发送一份来源清晰的页面：谁发布了更新、谁保持沉默、谁进度滞后，以及任何与实际情况不符的状态。你的团队无需登录。这是参谋，而非监控。
products.description: Eodly reads Slack, Telegram, Discord, GitHub and Linear, and sends founders one sourced page each evening: who shipped, who's quiet, who's slipping, and any status that doesn't match reality. Your team never logs in. A chief of staff, not surveillance.

products.name: Compendium
products.tagline: Keeping your team, agents, and data on one page
products.summaryZh: 让团队、客服与数据尽在掌握
products.descriptionZh: Compendium 是一个面向AI智能体团队的协作中枢。通过Compendium，所有智能体共享同一记忆库，使知识、决策和上下文信息能够即时触达每个成员、每个场景。您可以在共享会话中工作，让您和队友的智能体基于同一上下文协同构建，而非各自为政的孤立线程；可获取您缺席期间变更内容的摘要（无需手动翻查）；还能实时查看队友及其智能体正在构建的内容。
products.description: Compendium is a company brain for teams working with AI agents. With compendium, all your agents share one memory, so knowledge, decisions, and context are available to everyone, everywhere, instantaneously. Compendium allows you to work in shared sessions where you and your teammates' agents build on the same context instead of siloed threads, get summaries of what changed while you were away (without digging), and have a live view of what your teammates and their agents are building right now.

products.name: Knowledge Atlas by Fini
products.tagline: The self-learning knowledge base that improves itself
products.summaryZh: 自我完善的知识库
products.descriptionZh: Fini的自我维护知识层。它从已解决的工单中编写帮助文章，标记冲突，并将每个AI回答基于一个引用来源。
products.description: Fini's self-maintaining knowledge layer. It writes help articles from resolved tickets, flags conflicts, and grounds every AI answer in one cited source.

products.name: Cutrix
products.tagline: AI-powered video translation that preserves speaker's voice
products.summaryZh: AI驱动的视频翻译，保留原声
products.descriptionZh: 别再忍受机械式的配音了。Cutrix 采用智能代理工作流翻译视频，同时保留演讲者的原始情感和自然节奏。无需陡峭的学习曲线，即可体验超自然的音画同步。立即注册，获取免费额度！
products.description: Stop settling for robotic dubbing. Cutrix uses an Agentic workflow to translate videos while preserving the speaker's original emotion and natural pacing. Experience hyper-natural alignment without the steep learning curve. Sign up for free credits today!

products.name: Bono AI
products.tagline: Talk Once. Publish Everywhere.
products.summaryZh: 一次撰写，全域发布。
products.descriptionZh: 认识Bono，你的语音AI内容策略师。只需对话10分钟，Bono就能将谈话转化为博客文章、LinkedIn/X内容、新闻通讯等，且全部保留你的个人风格。无需空白页面、无需提示词、无需代笔、无需中介机构。
products.description: Meet Bono, your voice AI content strategist. Talk for 10 minutes, and Bono turns the conversation into a blog post, LinkedIn/X content, a newsletter, and more, all in your voice. No blank page, no prompts, no ghostwriters, no agencies.

products.name: Orus
products.tagline: Claude for investing in perpetuals
products.summaryZh: Claude 用于永续合约投资
products.descriptionZh: Orus是一个MCP服务器，可将你的Farao交易账户接入任意AI聊天界面。通过OAuth连接WhatsApp、Telegram、Claude、ChatGPT或Grok，即可在100多个市场中获取完整市场研究及执行能力——涵盖加密货币永续合约、代币化股票（特斯拉、英伟达）、外汇和大宗商品。资金保留在你的自托管钱包中。可选择每笔交易手动确认或设置自主限制。每次会话均可追踪，并可通过Farao应用撤销。
products.description: Orus is an MCP server that puts your Farao trading account inside any AI chat. Connect WhatsApp, Telegram, Claude, ChatGPT, or Grok via OAuth and get full market research + execution across 100+ markets — crypto perps, tokenized stocks (Tesla, Nvidia), FX, and commodities. Funds stay in your self-custodial wallet. Choose manual confirmation per trade or set autonomous limits. Every session is tracked and revocable from the Farao app.

products.name: NanoKVM-Go
products.tagline: Give your AI agent physical control over any screen
products.summaryZh: 赋予你的AI代理对任何屏幕的物理控制权
products.descriptionZh: NanoKVM-Go 是一款手表大小的无服务器 4K KVM，支持 WiFi 6 并内置 Tailscale。它作为开放的 MCP 服务器运行，为 AI 代理提供硬件级别的屏幕可视性，并可通过键盘/鼠标输入控制任何连接的笔记本电脑或移动设备。
products.description: NanoKVM-Go is a watch-sized, serverless 4K KVM with WiFi 6 and built-in Tailscale. It acts as an open MCP server to give AI agents hardware-level screen visibility and keyboard/mouse input control over any connected laptop or mobile device.

products.name: Jamboree
products.tagline: Multiplayer synthesizer
products.summaryZh: 多人合成器
products.descriptionZh: 一款多人协作的音效设计工具。完全基于浏览器运行，采用真正的点对点网络连接，支持SoundFont导出、实时光标与聊天功能，让您能与其他用户实时共同塑造音色。内置真实合成引擎：5种波形振荡器、共振滤波器、完整ADSR包络放大器，以及可路由至滤波器或放大器的低频振荡器，用于生成动态变化的音效。
products.description: A multiplayer sound design tool. Fully browser-based with true peer-to-peer networking, SoundFont export, and live cursors/chat so you can shape patches with others in real time. Comes with a real synth engine: 5-shape oscillator, resonant filter, full ADSR amp envelope, and an LFO routable to filter or amp for evolving, moving sounds.

products.name: On-Device Field Extraction by Veryfi
products.tagline: Secure on-device extraction even if you're offline
products.summaryZh: 即使离线，也能安全地在设备端进行提取
products.descriptionZh: 今天，我们推出设备端字段检测功能，这是Veryfi Lens SDK的一项新能力，能在收据被捕获的瞬间进行验证，而非在上传、处理并可能被拒绝之后。验证时机的这一微小调整，将极大改变后续流程。
products.description: Today we're introducing On-Device Field Detection, a new capability in the Veryfi Lens SDK that validates receipts the moment they're captured, not after they've been uploaded, processed, and potentially rejected. It's a small shift in when validation happens, and it changes a lot about what happens next.
